name: Multimodal iEEG–fMRI Naturalistic Film (ds003688)
description: An open OpenNeuro dataset (ds003688) pairing intracranial EEG from 51 participants (ages 5–55) with fMRI from 30 participants during the same short audiovisual film, with 18 individuals completing both (non-simultaneously). Its combination of high temporal and spatial resolution during naturalistic social stimulation supports cross-modal study of perception, language, and social scene processing.
citation: Berezutskaya J, Vansteensel MJ, Aarnoutse EJ, et al. (2022). Open multimodal iEEG-fMRI dataset from naturalistic stimulation with a short audiovisual film. Scientific Data, 9, 91.

publications.title: Open multimodal iEEG-fMRI dataset from naturalistic stimulation with a short audiovisual film
